revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Button_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Button_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Navbox
| name       = Button templates
| title      = Button templates
| bodyclass  = hlist
| state      = {{{state|{{{1|}}}}}}

| group1     = General button templates
| list1      =
*{{tl|Clickable button}}
*{{tl|Branded Button}}
*{{tl|Button}} <small>(not clickable)</small>
*{{tl|Blue button}}
*{{tl|Mw button}}

| group2     = WikiProject-specific buttons
| list2      =
*Article Wizard
**[[:en:Template:Article wizard/button|button]]
**[[:en:Template:Article wizard/button2|button2]]
**[[:en:Template:Article wizard/button wizard|button wizard]]
*{{tl|Big Blue Button}}
*{{tl|Big Red Button}}
*{{tl|Big Cyan Button}}
*{{tl|Big Green Button}}
*{{tl|Big Lime Button}}
*{{tl|Big Orange Button}}
*{{tl|Big Turquoise Button}}
*{{tl|Big Fuchsia Button}}
*{{tl|Big Skyblue Button}}
*{{tl|Big Purple Button}}
*{{tl|Big Yellow Button}}
*{{tl|AfC button}}
*{{tl|Cleanup Button}}

|belowstyle = font-weight:bold;
|below = 
* {{icon|category}} [[:Category:Wikipedia button templates|Category]]
}}<noinclude>

{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- PLEASE ADD THIS TEMPLATE'S CATEGORIES TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
